news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues to expand its single stock Leveraged ETF suite with OPEN, CIFR, GRAB, DUOL, LAC, and UPS

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long LAC Daily ETF (LACG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Lithium Americas Corporation (NYSE: LAC) stock, less fees, and expenses. LAC focuses on advancing large-scale, resource-rich lithium projects to support the electric vehicle and battery industries. LACG was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
